title: Harden orchestrator GitHub Actions workflow
description: WHAT: Update .github/workflows/orchestrator-mcp.yml: paths for .cursor/commands, docs/publishing, scripts; timeout-minutes; optional concurrency; keep needs verify-plugin before build-test. WHY: Parity runs when relevant files change. HOW: workflow YAML only.

title: Implement .cursor/commands parity in verifier
description: WHAT: Extend scripts/verify-cursor-orchestrator.mjs (or helper): enumerate plugin commands vs .cursor/commands; set equality; realpath match; clear errors. Optionally derive EXPECTED_NAMES from filesystem. Commit symlinks under .cursor/commands if missing. WHY: CI catches workspace slash drift. HOW: scripts/verify-cursor-orchestrator.mjs, .cursor/commands/*.

title: Add publish-gate script
description: WHAT: Add scripts/publish-gate.mjs running validate-template, verify-cursor-orchestrator, optional --with-mcp for mcp-server. Document in runbook as single local gate. WHY: Matches CI order locally. HOW: scripts/publish-gate.mjs, docs/publishing/marketplace.md.

title: Add CHANGELOG and version bump policy
description: WHAT: Add CHANGELOG (prefer plugins/cursor-orchestrator/CHANGELOG.md) with [Unreleased] template; document when to bump plugin.json vs marketplace.json metadata.version in runbook. WHY: Auditable releases. HOW: new CHANGELOG, extend docs/publishing/marketplace.md.

title: Add publishing runbook and README links
description: WHAT: Add docs/publishing/marketplace.md (versioning, changelog location, validation order, FAQ). Update root README and plugins/cursor-orchestrator/README.md with links—no duplicate checklists. WHY: One discoverable publish path. HOW: docs/publishing/marketplace.md, README.md, plugins/cursor-orchestrator/README.md.
